content.full_text:
March 6, 2007

Jonathan Ellison
General Counsel, Paratransit, Inc.
P.O. Box 231100
Sacramento, California 95823

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-030

Dear Mr. Ellison:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the applicability of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 Regulation 18329.5(a)(3)(A) (copy enclosed) provides that the Fair Political Practices Commission (the “Commission”) will render formal written advice or informal assistance regarding the interpretation of an agency’s conflict of interest code or the application of that code to a specific individual only if he or she first requests a determination from the agency and the code reviewing body for such conflict of interest code.2 This provision is important because the code reviewing body for a particular state or local agency adopts that body’s duties under the Act. (Sections 87300-87312.) The code reviewing body would also determine what duties actors within a particular agency would have. The Commission is not permitted to render advice unless you first comply with this requirement. Because, according to your letter, you have not yet met this requirement, your request has been withdrawn.

While we understand that your inquiry concerns a non-profit corporation, your ultimate question is whether or not Paratransit, Inc. is an agency under the Act. This determination must first be made by the proper party. As we discussed on the phone, you will need to contact the Sacramento County Board of Supervisors to get its determination on this issue. It might be helpful if you attach this letter when you make your inquiry to that body.

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

2 The Commission is not the code reviewing body for the conflict of interest code in question. Accordingly, we must refer you to the code reviewing body: the Sacramento County Board of Supervisors. (Regulation 18329.5(a)(3)(B), copy enclosed.)

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Heather M. Rowan
Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl
I:\AdviceLtrs\07-030

Enclosure
